message:
Command `
# Check the patched wrapper (what we're actually synthesizing)
wc -l /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v
echo "---"
# What IPs are in the nc/apps IP library vs workspace ip?
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/ 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
# Check what the nc_gpio and peripheral IPs look like - are they pre-characterized/have GDS?
ls /nc/pdk/sky130A/libs.ref/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "---"
# Check for any pre-existing LEF/GDS for the IPs
find /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip -name "*.lef" -o -name "*.gds" 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo "---"
# Check what LEFs/GDS exist in the design
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/lef/ 2>/dev/null
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/gds/ 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.
